children.name: me.txt
children.content:
Hello!
I'm Kijmoshi, a 15 year old developer from Poland.
I'm mainly focused on web development, but I also have experience with javascript related technologies like React-Native or Electron.
My goal is to become a full-stack developer and create amazing projects.
Feel free to contact me via email or Discord ❤️
